text.title: Schedule Development Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to produce and maintain the schedule.

step.name: define-activities
step.action: Convert each work package into one or more verb-led activities; rename noun-only entries.

step.name: sequence
step.action: Identify predecessors with explicit FS/SS/FF/SF type + lag if any.

step.name: estimate
step.action: Apply three-point (O/M/P) PERT for activities >5 days; single-point for <=5 days.

step.name: resource
step.action: Assign one named resource per activity; flag over-allocations using calendar.

step.name: buffer
step.action: Add named project buffer + feeding buffers per non-critical chain; hide nothing in activity estimates.

step.name: refresh
step.action: Recompute critical path; update buffer health; bump last_refreshed.
